an7.84:1.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these seven principles for the settlement of disciplinary issues, for settling and pacifying any disciplinary issues that may arise. What seven?
an7.84:1.2:
"(1) Removal by presence may be applied;
(2) removal by memory may be applied; (3) removal on account of past insanity may be applied; (4) the acknowledgment of an offense may be applied; (5) the majority opinion may be applied; (6) a charge of aggravated misconduct may be applied; and (7) covering over with grass may be applied.
an7.84:2.2: "There are, bhikkhus, these seven principles for the settlement of disciplinary issues, for settling and pacifying any disciplinary issues that may arise."
